data.text/markdown:
TycoonLE Quickstart Rollout

Tycoon Learning Environment (TycoonLE) is a JAX reinforcement learning environment for logistics planning. Agents build routes, move cargo, manage cash and debt, and try to improve delayed economic outcomes over a generated transport world. This notebook is the shortest end-to-end tour: choose a scenario, run a deterministic baseline policy, inspect one decision step, and export a replay for the browser UI.

1. Pick a scenario

A scenario type controls the kind of planning problem, such as a single route, low-cash financing, a supply chain, or terrain-constrained routing. The seed chooses a generated world within that scenario type. The rollout length controls how many candidate decisions the baseline policy takes.

data.text/html: Scenario

data.text/markdown:
2. Run a baseline rollout

The environment exposes a fixed-size action table plus an action_mask. For this quickstart, the policy simply takes the first valid candidate at every step. This is intentionally simple: it gives us a reproducible trace to inspect before introducing learning.

3. Read the rollout summary

The summary is the high-level outcome of the rollout: how many steps ran, final score, delivered cargo, and operating profit. It is useful for comparing seeds, scenario types, or policies before digging into individual decisions.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='SFPL-0' random-id='42d8b3f6-473f-52f8-6779-987a7125ffb9'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-data='"[{\"split\":\"dev\",\"scenario_type\":\"chain\",\"seed\":138005,\"steps\":12,\"finalScore\":31.258,\"cargoDelivered\":688.931,\"operatingProfit\":-7714.493}]"' data-total-rows='1' data-total-columns='7' data-max-columns='50' data-banner-text='""' data-pagination='false' data-page-size='10' data-field-types='[["split",["string","str"]],["scenario_type",["string","str"]],["seed",["integer","int64"]],["steps",["integer","int64"]],["finalScore",["number","float64"]],["cargoDelivered",["number","float64"]],["operatingProfit",["number","float64"]]]' data-show-filters='true' data-show-download='true' data-show-column-summaries='false' data-show-data-types='true' data-show-page-size-selector='false' data-show-column-explorer='true' data-show-chart-builder='true' data-row-headers='[]' data-hidden-columns='[]' data-has-stable-row-id='false' data-lazy='false' data-preload='false'></marimo-table></marimo-ui-element>

data.text/markdown:
4. Inspect one decision

Move the event slider to look at the state before a selected action. The map uses the same OpenGFX sprite assets as the replay UI, while the tables below show the candidate frontier and metric changes for that step.

data.text/html: Step inspector

data.text/markdown:
World snapshot

This sprite map shows the generated industries, towns, terrain, and later any routes built by the policy. It is meant to connect the numeric action table to the world the agent is acting in.

Candidate frontier

Each row is a candidate action the agent may choose. mask tells whether the action is executable now, loan_needed explains financing pressure, and rank is the environment's heuristic ordering signal rather than a learned policy score.

data.text/markdown:
Metric delta

This table compares metrics before and after the selected action. For route-building steps, cash may drop immediately while score, cargo, or profit improve only after later wait steps deliver goods.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='ROlb-0' random-id='0e0e83b5-2ca3-2f3f-4a6d-36968309623c'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-data='"[{\"metric\":\"score\",\"before\":20.0,\"after\":25.58,\"delta\":5.579999999999998},{\"metric\":\"cargoDelivered\",\"before\":0.0,\"after\":0.0,\"delta\":0.0},{\"metric\":\"operatingProfit\",\"before\":0.0,\"after\":0.0,\"delta\":0.0},{\"metric\":\"networkValue\",\"before\":0.0,\"after\":5.0,\"delta\":5.0},{\"metric\":\"routeCount\",\"before\":0.0,\"after\":1.0,\"delta\":1.0},{\"metric\":\"vehicles\",\"before\":0.0,\"after\":1.0,\"delta\":1.0},{\"metric\":\"invalidActions\",\"before\":0.0,\"after\":0.0,\"delta\":0.0},{\"metric\":\"debtRatio\",\"before\":0.0,\"after\":0.0,\"delta\":0.0},{\"metric\":\"utilization\",\"before\":0.0,\"after\":0.0,\"delta\":0.0},{\"metric\":\"inTransitCargo\",\"before\":0.0,\"after\":0.0,\"delta\":0.0}]"' data-total-rows='15' data-total-columns='4' data-max-columns='50' data-banner-text='""' data-pagination='true' data-page-size='10' data-field-types='[["metric",["string","str"]],["before",["number","float64"]],["after",["number","float64"]],["delta",["number","float64"]]]' data-show-filters='true' data-show-download='true' data-show-column-summaries='true' data-show-data-types='true' data-show-page-size-selector='true' data-show-column-explorer='true' data-show-chart-builder='true' data-row-headers='[]' data-hidden-columns='[]' data-has-stable-row-id='false' data-lazy='false' data-preload='false'></marimo-table></marimo-ui-element>

data.text/markdown:
5. Export a replay

The replay JSON captures the rollout as an inspectable audit trace. Load this file in the browser UI to step through route choices, cargo flow, financing behavior, rewards, and score over time.
Replay exported to runs/marimo/quickstart/replay.json.
